name: Pork Chitterlings (Chitlin's)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large pot, bring the pork chitterlings, vinegar, chopped onions, hot peppers, and salt to a boil in plenty of water.
2. Reduce heat to maintain a simmer and cook for 3-1/2 to 4 hours, changing the water twice, until the chitterlings are fork-tender.
3. Remove from heat and allow to cool. Strain out all fat and foreign matter.
4. Reheat the chitterlings in fresh water and serve hot, passing hot pepper sauce alongside.
5. For frying:
- Dip 2-inch pieces of chitterlings into corn meal seasoned with salt and pepper.
- Fry in deep oil until crisp and golden brown.
6. For battered chitterlings:
- Prepare a thin pancake batter.
- Dip the chitterlings into the batter and fry until golden brown.
7. Serve hot with baked potatoes, slaw, and cornbread. Serves 4-6.
